{"success":true,"message":"Success","data":[{"_id":"69bc1c5ade2ba4d79e48e718","seller":{"_id":"6959770badc022b0f264a6d7","name":"Seller One","email":"seller@test.com"},"name":"OnePlus Wired Earphones","description":"OnePlus Wired Earphones – Sound Refined, Clarity Redefined

Experience immersive audio with OnePlus Wired Earphones, crafted by OnePlus for those who value clear sound and reliable performance. Designed for everyday use, these earphones combine comfort, durability, and high-quality audio in a sleek package.

Built with precision-tuned drivers, the earphones deliver crisp vocals, balanced bass, and detailed sound output. Whether you're listening to music, attending calls, or watching videos, the audio experience remains smooth and enjoyable.

The ergonomic in-ear design ensures a secure and comfortable fit, making them ideal for long listening sessions. With a lightweight build and tangle-resistant cable, they are easy to carry and use on the go.

Equipped with an in-line remote and microphone, OnePlus Wired Earphones allow you to control music, adjust volume, and take calls effortlessly without reaching for your device.

The standard 3.5mm jack or USB-C connectivity (depending on the model) ensures compatibility with a wide range of smartphones, tablets, and laptops.

Designed for simplicity and performance, these earphones are a dependable choice for daily audio needs.

⭐ Key Highlights

• High-quality sound with clear vocals and balanced bass
• Comfortable in-ear ergonomic design
• Lightweight with tangle-resistant cable
• In-line remote with built-in microphone
• Easy connectivity (3.5mm jack / USB-C)
• Durable build for everyday use
• Ideal for music, calls, and entertainment","price":1999,"stock":5,"category":"Electronics","images":[{"publicId":"product_images/nvapwenwvk6cav6e7xs0","url":"https://res.cloudinary.com/dk6ahmqwh/image/upload/v1773935708/product_images/nvapwenwvk6cav6e7xs0.png","_id":"69bc1c5ede2ba4d79e48e71a"}],"isActive":true,"isEdited":false,"rating":4,"createdAt":"2026-03-19T15:55:06.901Z","updatedAt":"2026-03-19T15:55:10.321Z","__v":0},{"_id":"69bc188fde2ba4d79e48e582","seller":{"_id":"6959770badc022b0f264a6d7","name":"Seller One","email":"seller@test.com"},"name":"HP i7 12th Generation Laptop","description":"HP i7 12th Generation Laptop – Performance Refined, Productivity Redefined

Experience powerful computing with the HP i7 12th Generation Laptop, engineered by HP to deliver speed, efficiency, and reliability for modern users. Whether you're working, studying, or multitasking, this laptop ensures smooth and responsive performance.

Powered by the advanced Intel Core i7 12th Gen processor, it offers exceptional speed and intelligent performance optimization. From heavy applications to everyday tasks, everything runs seamlessly without lag.

The laptop features a sleek and modern design with a high-quality display that delivers sharp visuals and vibrant colors. Its lightweight build makes it easy to carry, while the durable construction ensures long-lasting use.

With ample RAM and fast SSD storage, the HP i7 laptop allows quick boot times, efficient multitasking, and smooth operation across multiple applications. It’s ideal for coding, content creation, office work, and entertainment.

Stay connected and productive with multiple ports, fast connectivity options, and long battery life that supports your daily needs without frequent charging interruptions.

Designed for performance and convenience, this laptop is a perfect choice for students, professionals, and everyday users.

⭐ Key Highlights

• Powered by Intel Core i7 12th Gen processor
• Smooth multitasking with high-speed performance
• Fast SSD storage for quick boot and load times
• Sleek, lightweight, and durable design
• High-quality display with clear visuals
• Long battery life for all-day productivity
• Ideal for coding, work, study, and entertainment","price":78889,"stock":12,"category":"Electronics","images":[{"publicId":"product_images/bz09wk7rpgs7cgidoq0p","url":"https://res.cloudinary.com/dk6ahmqwh/image/upload/v1773934737/product_images/bz09wk7rpgs7cgidoq0p.jpg","_id":"69bc1892de2ba4d79e48e584"}],"isActive":true,"isEdited":false,"rating":4,"createdAt":"2026-03-19T15:38:55.958Z","updatedAt":"2026-03-19T15:38:58.592Z","__v":0}]}
